project_context.vibe: Objective, dense, authoritative, rigid, highly functional, data-first

colors.instructions: Update index.css to use these strict dark mode variables. Ensure positive values (beating benchmark, new holdings) use primary green, and negative values use destructive red.

hierarchy.h4: text-xs sm:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-muted-foreground

typography.instructions: Import Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts. Do NOT use Inter for headings. Use uppercase mono text for table headers.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.gap: gap-4 or use gap-[1px] with a dark wrapper background to create a true 'border-collapse' terminal grid look.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Dense. p-3 or p-4 inside widgets. Avoid generous p-8 in dashboards unless it is an empty state.
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Flat background, 1px solid subtle border (border-border). Sharp corners. Override standard Shadcn rounded-xl.

components.navigation: Sticky top-bar or left-rail. Solid background (hsl(240 10% 4%)) with hard bottom/right 1px border. No glassmorphism.
components.buttons: Square edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), solid fill for primary. Ghost with sharp 1px borders for secondary.
components.tables: Dense. Use mono font for numbers. Right-align numbers. Zebra striping with very subtle background shift (bg-muted/30).
components.charts: Use Recharts with dark mode axes. Green for beating benchmark, Red for trailing. Remove soft curves, use step-lines or sharp linear interpolation.
components.cards: Force rounded-none or rounded-sm. No box-shadows. 1px solid borders.

visual_enhancers.borders: Grid Borders strategy. Expose the skeleton using border-white/10.
visual_enhancers.effects: No heavy gradients. Flat, solid colors. Use 1px inner highlights selectively.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (dense and readable at small sizes).

login_hero_bg.description: Abstract geometric lines and shapes on black background
login_hero_bg.instructions: Use this purely as a dramatic, muted background (opacity 10-20%) for the Login/Register page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Override default tailwind --radius to 0rem or 0.125rem in index.css to achieve the sharp Bloomberg terminal aesthetic.
Update index.css root and .dark classes with the strict monochrome + bright green/red accent palette defined above.
Implement the layout using CSS Grid with tight gaps to maximize screen real estate.
Ensure all numerical data, tickers, and percentages use 'IBM Plex Mono' (or generic monospace if not loaded) for vertical alignment.
For the 'Month-on-Month Sector Weight Change' delta bars, use stark Green/Red blocks without rounded corners.
Do not use Shadcn default Card styling out of the box (which is rounded and soft). Override it to be flat, sharp, and bordered.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes based on role (e.g., data-testid='fund-selector-dropdown').
For the Alerts Center, use the warning/accent color (Amber) for category/objective changes, and primary (Green) or destructive (Red) for manager changes depending on the context.
Limit color usage strictly to data encoding (Green = Good/Up/Beating, Red = Bad/Down/Failing). Keep the rest of the UI completely grayscale.
